name: golang-github-fsnotify-fsnotify-dev
title: golang-github-fsnotify-fsnotify-dev
description:
File system notifications for Go
Package fsnotify provides a platform-independent interface for file system
notifications, for use with the Go programming language.
.
This package contains the fsnotify library source.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-fsnotify-fsnotify-dev because File system notifications for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-fsnotify-fsnotify-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-fsnotify-fsnotify-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-fsnotify-fsnotify-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
